name: Light Rye Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in the bread pan in the order listed.
2. If your machine's manual recommends dry ingredients first, reverse the order.
3. Select Basic Wheat Cycle and Light setting (or equivalent) on your machine.
4. Press Start.
Note: Bread flour can be used instead of unbleached flour.
Most recipes in this book call for some amount of canola oil, which can be omitted.
